description_long: This object is a segmented doll with a metallic, glossy red and silver finish, featuring a large head with pigtails, a ruffled skirt, and mechanical limbs. The head is round with exaggerated facial features, including large eyes, a red nose, and red cheeks, giving it a clown-like appearance. The body is composed of several disconnected parts, including the torso, arms, legs, and head, all floating apart from each other. The skirt is flared and shiny, matching the red of the hair and some body parts, while the limbs and torso are primarily silver with black accents. The doll's design is robotic, with visible joints and mechanical details, suggesting an animatronic or toy robot theme. The overall appearance is both playful and slightly unsettling, with a strong visual emphasis on the contrast between the red and silver surfaces.
description: A segmented, glossy red and silver robotic doll with pigtails, a ruffled skirt, and exaggerated facial features, composed of floating mechanical parts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face with red pigtails, large eyes, red nose, and ruffled skirt, with all parts separated and visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mechanical structure of the head and limbs, with the skirt and torso visible from the side and parts floating apart.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, pigtails, and skirt, with the mechanical joints and disconnected limbs more apparent.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the back of the head, one pigtail, and the segmented arrangement of the limbs and skirt.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a shiny, metallic red ruffled skirt with a matching red bodice, accented by silver mechanical limbs and torso. The style is reminiscent of a circus performer or animatronic entertainer, with no visible fabric patterns but a strong emphasis on glossy, synthetic materials.
attribute_pose: The doll's body parts are separated and floating, with the head upright, arms and legs detached and positioned around the torso, and the skirt flared out below the torso. The pose is static, with no dynamic limb movement.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll's face displays a wide-eyed, neutral expression with a small, closed mouth, raised eyebrows, and prominent red cheeks, giving it a slightly surprised or alert look.
attribute_hair_style: Short, bright red hair styled in two large, round pigtails on either side of the head, with a smooth, shiny texture.
